jsonLd.title: PGIMER is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
PGIMER, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PGIMER:
PGIMER is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER!
